body_txt: Superpowers that involve creating explosions . Can overlap with Why Am I Ticking? , Playing with Fire , and Ludicrous Gibs . See also Action Bomb . Villainous and/or mentally insane users are considered Mad Bombers . For the non-superpower equivalent see Throw Down the Bomblet . When this trope meets Enhanced Punch , you've got an Explosive Punch . Also includes Fatal Fireworks abilities, when they don't fall under Playing with Fire .
